title: Petroleum Engineers
description: Devise methods to improve oil and gas extraction and production and determine the need for new or modified tool designs. Oversee drilling and offer technical advice.

tasks.text: Specify and supervise well modification and stimulation programs to maximize oil and gas recovery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor production rates, and plan rework processes to improve production.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain records of drilling and production operations.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Analyze data to recommend placement of wells and supplementary processes to enhance production.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assist engineering and other personnel to solve operating problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct and monitor the completion and evaluation of wells, well testing, or well surveys.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop plans for oil and gas field drilling, and for product recovery and treatment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess costs and estimate the production capabilities and economic value of oil and gas wells, to evaluate the economic viability of potential drilling sites.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Confer with scientific, engineering, and technical personnel to resolve design, research, and testing problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interpret drilling and testing information for personnel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate activities of workers engaged in research, planning, and development.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write technical reports for engineering and management personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate findings to develop, design, or test equipment or processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test machinery and equipment to ensure that it is safe and conforms to performance specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assign work to staff to obtain maximum utilization of personnel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Simulate reservoir performance for different recovery techniques, using computer models.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design and implement environmental controls on oil and gas operations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise the removal of drilling equipment, the removal of any waste, and the safe return of land to structural stability when wells or pockets are exhausted.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect oil and gas wells to determine that installations are completed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Coordinate the installation, maintenance, and operation of mining and oil field equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Take samples to assess the amount and quality of oil, the depth at which resources lie, and the equipment needed to properly extract them.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Design or modify mining and oil field machinery and tools, applying engineering principles.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct engineering research experiments to improve or modify mining and oil machinery and operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
